items.title: McDonald's Hot Honey Menu And Retro Toys Seek To Reignite U.S. Traffic
items.description: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) has introduced a limited-time Hot Honey Menu in the U.S., featuring items built around a sweet and spicy flavor profile. The company is also bringing back its 1980s to 1990s Changeables Happy Meal toys nationwide, reconnecting with customers who grew up with the original line. For a company that already serves a broad global customer base, McDonald's is leaning into two clear consumer themes at once: bolder flavors and nostalgia. The Hot Honey Menu follows earlier...

items.title: The DGI Core Portfolio: 2025 Year-End Review
Starbucks feels the heat as more chains compete for US coffee drinkers
items.description: Americans are drinking more coffee than they have in decades.  The company that revolutionized U.S. coffee culture remains America's biggest player, with nearly 17,000 U.S. stores and plans to open hundreds more.  Starbucks’ share of spending at all U.S. coffee shops fell in 2024 and 2025; it now stands at 48%, down from 52% in 2023, according to Technomic, a food industry consulting firm.
